headline: Where Do Boring Websites Go to Die?
A curated gallery of the impossible
body: Recent, formerly Godly, is a curated gallery of the most creative websites on the internet. Not templates. Not best practices. The weird, bold, experimental stuff that makes you scroll for 20 minutes and question every design decision you've ever made.
image_keyword: creative bold web design gallery collection

headline: Corporate sites score 3.2. These score 8.7.
body: The average corporate website scores 3.2 out of 10 on visual distinctiveness. The sites featured on Recent average 8.7. The gap isn't talent. It's permission. Most teams don't allow themselves to try anything that hasn't already been proven.
image_keyword: creative website vs boring corporate comparison

headline: AI defaults to safe. Recent defaults to bold.
body: AI design tools default to safe. They generate clean, professional, forgettable layouts because they're trained on the average of everything online. Recent exists to remind you that the best work lives at the edges, not in the middle.
image_keyword: AI generic design vs bold creative design

headline: 20 minutes a day, 40% more creative output
body: Designers who spend 20 minutes a day on Recent produce 40% more creative concepts in brainstorming sessions. The mechanism is simple. Exposure to high-quality edge cases expands your mental model of what's possible.

headline: Steal one technique. Not the whole design.
body: Here's how to use it productively. Pick one site per day. Spend 5 minutes deconstructing why it works. Steal one technique, not the whole design. Apply it to a boring project and watch the reaction.

headline: Follow me for 30 days of tools that sharpen your creative edge.
